lesson.menu_desc: Dialogue + polite requests with Can / Could (help, explain, repeat) -- 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- Asking for Help -- Getting Help and Asking Politely
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 9 -- Asking for Help

listenings.text: Hi Maisa, this is David. I have a problem with the finance report, and I need your help. Could you help me this afternoon? I do not understand one part. Could you explain the numbers on page two? If you are busy now, no problem. Can you call me back later? Thank you very much. You are a great colleague!

Hello, this is Sarah. Let me explain how to send the report. First, open the spreadsheet on your computer. Then, check the numbers one more time. After that, click the green button to save the file. Finally, send it to David by email. If something does not make sense, please ask me. I am happy to help you. Good luck!

extra_audio.text: Excuse me, David. Can you help me, please? I do not understand this report. Could you explain it to me? Thank you very much.
